en.extract:
The red-eyed puffback (Dryoscopus senegalensis) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found in Nigeria and Central Africa. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''red-eyed puffback''' ('''''Dryoscopus senegalensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Malaconotidae]]. It is found in [[Nigeria]] and [[Central Africa]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
